drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f0 == false, f2 != "ab", !(f2 not in ("a", "beta", "")), $b0_0_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1(4.5, $p0_0.getF2(), 10));
end
rule "R1"
when
    (or T1($b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f2) T1($b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f2))
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f1 not in (-1, 9, 2.0) || f1 <= 3, $b2_0_0 : f1, f0 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T1(-3.0, "b", $b2_0_0));
    insertLogical(new T1($p2_0.getF1(), "ab", -1000000007));
    $p2_0.setF0(true);
    $p2_0.setF2($p2_0.getF2());
    update($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
salience -8
when
    accumulate( T0(f1 in (2, -1) || f1 not in (6.0), $s3_0 : f1); $a3_0 : min($s3_0) )
    T1($b3_1_0 : f0, $b3_1_1 : f2)

end
